m	Z	m
)	a7
Fixer that changes zip(seq0, seq1, ...) into list(zip(seq0, seq1, ...)
unless there exists a 'from future_builtins import zip' statement in the
top-level namespace.
We avoid the transformation if the zip() call is directly contained in
iter(<>), list(<>), tuple(<>), sorted(<>), ...join(<>), or for V in <>:.
fixer_base)
Node)
python_symbols)
Name
ArgList
in_special_contextc
FixZipTzN
    power< 'zip' args=trailer< '(' [any] ')' > [trailers=trailer*]
    >
    z
future_builtins.zipc
args
trailersc
clone)
-/usr/lib64/python3.9/lib2to3/fixes/fix_zip.py
<listcomp>'
z$FixZip.transform.<locals>.<listcomp>
zip)
prefix
list)	Z

symsZ
powerr
selfZ
nodeZ
resultsr	
newr
	transform
FixZip.transformN)
